Each point = one analogue. X = lipidation site on PYY backbone.

Activity vs. Sidechain Composition

Sidechain string = monomers from backbone outward (dash-separated). Each point = one analogue.

Sequence Alignment

NW-aligned to reference. Gap columns (·) show insertions/deletions. Main chain positions numbered by HELM index; sidechain sub-positions as N.1, N.2, … (green headers, reading outward from backbone). Showing 50 of 53 compounds (identity ≥ 30%, max 50 rows).

Residues coloured by chemistry class. Hover a position number or cell to highlight the column.
